description: The v1-edge-query.json spec describes the Axiom Query API for regional edge deployments; most endpoints have no counterpart on the canonical Axiom Cloud API (api.axiom.co). Only queryApl maps cleanly (/v1/datasets/_apl). Drop the rest so they don't get generated as broken operations — the metrics-info endpoints under /v1/datasets/{dataset}/metrics on api.axiom.co are the OTLP metrics ingest endpoint and have an incompatible request/response shape. Note: patches run after the generate script prefixes every path with /v1/, so the JSON Pointer targets reflect that.
